scope_note: Indicators are defined from the Osuri CSVs and project satellite assets. db.json contributes photo-monitoring site locations only.

measured_variables.explanation: Site-level metadata, treatment labels, coordinates, canopy estimates, planting metadata, and the distance-to-forest covariate.
Adult-tree observations from 20 x 20 m plots.
Seedling and sapling observations from 5 x 5 m subplots.
Trait joins for successional class and wood density.
Project-level satellite validation cache for Meta canopy height and Alpha Earth embeddings.
Photo-monitoring site locations only; not used to define Osuri indicators.

adult_tree_plots.explanation: Adult trees were sampled in 20 x 20 m plots.

sapling_subplots.explanation: Naturally recruited saplings were sampled in nested 5 x 5 m subplots.

transects.explanation: No explicit transect geometry is described in the paper or encoded in the CSVs.

indicators.name: Canopy cover
indicators.explanation: Plot-level percent canopy cover from visual estimates, used as one of the main structure indicators.

indicators.name: Adult tree density
indicators.explanation: Number of adult tree records per 20 x 20 m plot after excluding cut and dead trees and retaining paper-eligible plots.

indicators.name: Tree height:diameter ratio (log:log)
indicators.formula: mean(log(Height) / log(DBH)) for rows with HD_include == 1
indicators.explanation: Average log-log height-diameter ratio for trees included by the paper's HD filter.
indicators.js_snippet: const logHd = mean(rows.filter(r => Number(r.HD_include) === 1).map(r => Math.log(Number(r.Height)) / Math.log(Number(r.DBH))));

indicators.name: Adult species density
indicators.formula: number of unique adult species per Plot_code
indicators.explanation: Count of distinct adult tree species in each plot.

indicators.name: Adult late-successional species density
indicators.formula: number of unique adult species per plot where Habt_New == 'Mature'
indicators.explanation: Count of distinct mature-forest adult species per plot after joining species traits.
indicators.js_snippet: const lateSuccessionalAdultSpecies = new Set(rows.filter(r => r.Habt_New === 'Mature').map(r => r.species).filter(Boolean)).size;

indicators.name: Community similarity to benchmark rainforest
indicators.explanation: Bray-Curtis similarity of each plot's adult-species composition to benchmark plots, scaled as 100 * (1 - average Bray-Curtis distance to benchmarks).

indicators.name: Sapling density
indicators.explanation: Total counted seedlings and saplings per 5 x 5 m subplot.

indicators.name: Sapling native fraction
indicators.explanation: Fraction of sapling abundance contributed by non-introduced species.
indicators.js_snippet: const nativeFraction = sum(rows.filter(r => r.Habt_New !== 'Int').map(r => Number(r.regen))) / sum(rows.map(r => Number(r.regen)));

indicators.name: Sapling species density
indicators.formula: number of recorded sapling species rows per Plot_code
indicators.explanation: Count of sapling species entries per plot; in the Osuri table this is effectively sapling species richness.
indicators.js_snippet: const saplingSpeciesDensity = new Set(rows.map(r => r.acc_name || r['Species.name']).filter(Boolean)).size;

indicators.name: Sapling late-successional species density
indicators.formula: number of sapling species rows where Habt_New == 'Mature'
indicators.explanation: Count of mature-forest sapling species per plot.
indicators.js_snippet: const saplingLateSuccessionalSpecies = new Set(rows.filter(r => r.Habt_New === 'Mature').map(r => r.acc_name).filter(Boolean)).size;

indicators.name: Aboveground carbon storage
indicators.explanation: Per-tree carbon is estimated from wood density, DBH, and height using the Chave-style allometry implemented in the paper's R script, then summed and scaled to Mg/ha.

indicators.name: Distance to contiguous forest
indicators.explanation: Isolation covariate used in the paper's Active-vs-Passive interaction models; not itself one of the 11 response indicators.

indicators.name: Meta canopy height
indicators.explanation: External satellite-derived structural analogue sampled at Osuri plot locations from the Meta canopy asset used in this project.

indicators.name: Alpha Earth embedding similarity to benchmark
indicators.explanation: External embedding-space analogue computed by comparing each plot's Alpha Earth vector to the benchmark centroid.

site_locations.name: IPTO_04R
site_locations.notes: Just above and the restoration site board

site_locations.name: VAR3_10R
site_locations.notes: Up tea-forest boundary, left turn as the boundary path bends right

site_locations.name: VAR4_10R
site_locations.notes: Sliver between Tata coffee and reservoir

site_locations.name: OLV1_10R
site_locations.notes: Inner plot to the right of the path just beyond fragment boundary
